title: T-021 — inventory_cost_layers (FIFO) + item_wac_state + cost_variances schema (§6.4, §11.4, §11.5)
prompt:
# T-021 — Inventory valuation + cost variance schema

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §6.4 inventory_cost_layers DDL (lines 380-396), item_wac_state DDL (lines 399-409); §6.1 row 11 cost_variances; §11.4 V-FIN-INV-01..05; §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-01..04.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Drizzle migration + ORM entries for `inventory_cost_layers` (FIFO per LP), `item_wac_state` (running WAC avg), and `cost_variances` (per WO per category). RLS via foundation function. Enforce V-FIN-INV-01..05 + V-FIN-VAR-01..04.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0058_inventory_valuation.sql`:
   - `CREATE TABLE inventory_cost_layers` per §6.4 lines 380-396 verbatim: id, org_id, item_id FK, lp_id FK→license_plates, receipt_date TIMESTAMPTZ, qty_received_kg NUMERIC(12,3), qty_remaining_kg NUMERIC(12,3) CHECK (qty_remaining_kg <= qty_received_kg) (V-FIN-INV-01), unit_cost NUMERIC(15,4), total_cost GENERATED ALWAYS AS (qty_remaining_kg * unit_cost) STORED, currency_id FK, source_type CHECK IN ('po_receipt','wo_output','adjustment','d365_import'), source_ref_id UUID, is_exhausted GENERATED ALWAYS AS (qty_remaining_kg <= 0.001) STORED, created_at.
   - Index `idx_fifo_consume ON inventory_cost_layers (org_id, item_id, receipt_date ASC) WHERE NOT is_exhausted` per §6.4 line 396.
   - V-FIN-INV-04 implemented as `CHECK (qty_remaining_kg >= 0)`; reject negative inventory.
   - `CREATE TABLE item_wac_state` per §6.4 lines 399-409: id, org_id, item_id FK, currency_id FK, total_qty_kg NUMERIC(14,3) DEFAULT 0, total_value NUMERIC(16,4) DEFAULT 0, avg_cost GENERATED ALWAYS AS (CASE WHEN total_qty_kg > 0 THEN total_value / total_qty_kg ELSE 0 END) STORED, last_updated_at, UNIQUE(org_id, item_id, currency_id).
   - `CREATE TABLE cost_variances` (id, org_id, wo_id FK, currency_id FK, category TEXT CHECK IN ('material','labor','overhead','yield','waste'), variance_amount NUMERIC(15,4), variance_pct NUMERIC(8,2), severity TEXT CHECK IN ('info','warn','critical'), note_id UUID NULL FK→variance_notes, calculated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), retention_until GENERATED).
   - `CREATE TABLE variance_notes` (id, org_id, wo_id NULLABLE FK, item_id NULLABLE FK, category TEXT CHECK IN ('Root Cause','Supplier Issue','Production Issue','Quality Hold','Planned','Other'), note_text TEXT CHECK (length(note_text) BETWEEN 20 AND 1000), author_id FK, created_at; CHECK (wo_id IS NOT NULL OR item_id IS NOT NULL)).
   - All four tables: ENABLE + FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY via `app.current_org_id()`.
2. Drizzle ORM entries + register.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0058_inventory_valuation.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/inventory-cost-layers.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/item-wac-state.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/cost-variances.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/variance-notes.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/inventory-valuation-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given migration 0058 ran, when \d inventory_cost_layers inspected, then total_cost and is_exhausted are STORED GENERATED and CHECK V-FIN-INV-01 is registered. AND given pg_policies on all 4 tables, when listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id().
- Given INSERT with qty_remaining_kg=15, qty_received_kg=10, when run, then CHECK violation (V-FIN-INV-01). AND given INSERT with qty_remaining_kg=-1, when run, then CHECK fails (V-FIN-INV-04 qty_remaining >= 0).
- Given two item_wac_state rows for same (org_id, item_id, currency_id), when second INSERT, then UNIQUE violation.
- Given variance_notes INSERT with note_text length 10, when run, then CHECK fails. AND given variance_notes INSERT with both wo_id and item_id NULL, when run, then CHECK fails (at least one reference required).
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: inventory-valuation-schema.test.ts asserts each CHECK + UNIQUE + RLS + GENERATED columns.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test inventory-valuation-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow qty_remaining_kg > qty_received_kg (V-FIN-INV-01).
- Do not allow negative inventory (V-FIN-INV-04).
- Do not allow variance_notes without at least one of wo_id / item_id.
- Do not skip the partial FIFO consume index — query plan for FIFO consume relies on it.
- Do not use FLOAT for total_qty_kg / total_value (precision drift kills WAC).
- Do not weaken RLS / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.

pipeline_inputs.description: 4 tables: inventory_cost_layers (FIFO with partial index) + item_wac_state (running WAC GENERATED avg) + cost_variances (per WO per category) + variance_notes (polymorphic with min-length CHECK).
pipeline_inputs.details: FIFO consume index pinned on (org_id, item_id, receipt_date ASC) WHERE NOT is_exhausted. WAC avg is GENERATED (read-only). cost_variances + variance_notes split for FK clarity; variance_notes has discriminated CHECK (wo_id OR item_id). [AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]

Given two item_wac_state rows for same (org_id, item_id, currency_id), when second INSERT, then UNIQUE violation.
